articles.title: Iran vows to pursue, kill 'child killer' Netanyahu amid assassination rumours
articles.description: Iran vows to pursue kill child killer Netanyahu amid assassination rumours

articles.title: Iran US News LIVE Updates: Iran vows to kill ‘child-killing criminal’ Benjamin Netanyahu
articles.description: Iran US News LIVE Updates: Iran urged civilians in the United Arab Emirates to leave areas around ports, docks, and what it called ‘American hideouts,’ claiming that United States forces had launched attacks on Iran from those locations.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Naval Ravikant: ‘Desire is a contract that you make with yourself to be unhappy…’
articles.description: Naval Ravikant critiques hustle culture, emphasizing that happiness shouldn't be tied to achieving desires. He advocates for focusing on one significant goal.

articles.title: SC directs Centre to submit comprehensive report on encroachments along Ganga
articles.description: SC directs Centre to submit comprehensive report on encroachments along Ganga

articles.title: Starlink launches in Kuwait amid US-Israel-Iran war
articles.description: Starlink launches in Kuwait amid USIsraelIran war

articles.title: Al-Quds Day rally in Toronto calls for an end to the war in Iran & Lebanon
articles.description: Demonstrators gathered in Toronto for Al-Quds Day, denouncing US-Israeli attacks on Iran and Lebanon.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Charles Darwin: 'If the misery of the poor be caused not by the laws of nature…'
articles.description: While Darwin's work on evolutionary biology was revolutionary and laid the foundation of modern scientific thinking on the subject, his views on social injustice are equally important, and carry considerable weight in today's world, marked by stark wealth inequality.

articles.title: FinMin amends minimum public float rules for companies planning IPOs - Business Standard
articles.description: FinMin amends minimum public float rules for companies planning IPOs  Business Standard

topStories.title: Al-Quds Day rally in Toronto calls for an end to the war in Iran & Lebanon
topStories.description: Demonstrators gathered in Toronto for Al-Quds Day, denouncing US-Israeli attacks on Iran and Lebanon.

topStories.title: US names six crew killed in refuelling plane crash in Iraq
topStories.description: The aircraft was on a combat mission as part of ongoing US operations against Iran when it crashed in western Iraq on Thursday.

topStories.title: Quote of the day by American poet Robert Frost: ‘I took the one less traveled by…’
topStories.description: Robert Frost's famous lines about choosing the unconventional path resonate in today's world, where social media trends dictate lifestyles. The poem emphasizes that choices shape our identity.

topStories.title: Republic of Congo votes in election that could extend Sassou’s 42-year rule
topStories.description: Incumbent President Denis Sassou Nguesso, 82, is running for fifth term in polls boycotted by major political parties.

topStories.title: Iran's revenge for Khamenei? Tehran vows to ‘pursue and kill’ Netanyahu with full force as war enters third week
topStories.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps has pledged to target Benjamin Netanyahu amidst the ongoing conflict, which has seen at least 15 casualties from a U.S.-Israeli missile strike in Isfahan.

topStories.title: No End To Iran War: Trump Says Terms Not 'Good Enough Yet' For Ceasefire
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump said on Sunday the terms to end the war with Iran "aren't good enough yet", indicating sustained military operations against the Islamic Republic as the war entered its 16th...

topStories.title: G1 would have completed ribbon-cuttings: Congress's dig at ECI
topStories.description: The Congress frequently uses the term 'G2' to take swipes at Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Home Minister Amit Shah, who are both from Gujarat.

topStories.title: Trump may hit Iran's Kharg Island few more times ‘just for fun’ as Washington wishes to dock allies in Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: US President faces political pressure and declining approval as he struggles to justify military actions in Iran, while Russia benefits from the conflict.

topStories.title: FPV drone slams into US military base in Iraq
topStories.description: Iraq's Iranian-backed Kataib Hezbollah has released drone video from an attack on the US's Victory Base in Baghdad.

topStories.title: CBSE cancels all Class 12 board exams in the Middle East amid US-Iran war
topStories.description: CBSE had already announced the cancellation of all Class 10 Board exams in the region and had rescheduled the Class 12 exams scheduled till March 16.

topStories.title: Barrage of US-Israeli strikes target Isfahan
topStories.description: A US-Israeli strike on a factory in Isfahan has killed least 15 people, according to Iranian media.

topStories.title: Former CIA chief reveals early knowledge of Israeli attack plans
topStories.description: Former CIA chief David Petraeus says the US attacked Iran to scuttle its ability to defend itself against Israel.

dailyNews.title: Iran’s Space Research Centre severely damaged in strikes
dailyNews.description: Video has revealed the Iranian Space Research Centre in Tehran has suffered significant damage from Israeli-US strikes.

dailyNews.title: Will hit it just for fun: Trump warns of fresh US strikes on Iran's Kharg Island
dailyNews.description: Will hit it just for fun Trump warns of fresh US strikes on Irans Kharg Island

dailyNews.title: Japan suffers shocking collapse to Venezuela in World Baseball Classic
dailyNews.description: Japan's World Baseball Classic title defense ends with 8-5 quarterfinal loss to Venezuela as Shohei Ohtani and defending champions fall short of semifinals.

dailyNews.title: State Department urges Americans to leave Middle East as airspace closures disrupt travel
dailyNews.description: Americans traveling in Dubai and Israel recount missile alerts, canceled flights and sheltering during regional conflict as the State Department urges citizens to leave.

dailyNews.title: Exiled Iranian crown prince says he’s ready to lead Iran ‘as soon as the Islamic Republic falls’
dailyNews.description: Exiled Iranian Crown Prince Reza Pahlavi says he's ready to lead Iran's transition as conflict enters third week and regime faces potential collapse.

dailyNews.title: Kim Jong Un appears with teenage daughter at live-fire rocket test in North Korea
dailyNews.description: Kim Jong Un's daughter joins him at missile test, fueling ongoing succession speculation as North Korea escalates weapons demonstrations amid regional tensions.

dailyNews.title: Seahawks GM warns Washington’s new 'millionaire tax' could hurt free agent recruiting
dailyNews.description: Seahawks general manager John Schneider pointed to Washington’s new income tax rate on millionaires, warning it could hinder the franchise’s ability to sign top NFL free agents.

dailyNews.title: Headless, handless body found on New York road 56 years ago identified through DNA; killer remains unknown
dailyNews.description: A DNA breakthrough identified a headless body found in New York 56 years ago as Clyde Coppage from Pennsylvania, but his killer still remains at large.

dailyNews.title: Speech to US baseball team by Navy SEAL who killed Osama bin Laden prompts liberal backlash
dailyNews.description: Robert J. O'Neill, a former Navy SEAL who killed Osama bin Laden, gave the U.S. baseball team a speech before its quarterfinal victory, sparking social media criticism and praise.

dailyNews.title: Late Colts owner Jim Irsay’s memorabilia collection brings record prices at auction
dailyNews.description: Late Indianapolis Colts owner Jim Irsay’s memorabilia collection far exceeded expectations at Christie’s, generating $93.6 million against initial auction estimates of $40 million.

dailyNews.title: American flag raised, flies over US Embassy building in Venezuela for first time in 7 years
dailyNews.description: The U.S. Embassy in Caracas raised the American flag for the first time in seven years, months after former President Nicolás Maduro's capture by U.S. forces.

dailyNews.title: Sharon Osbourne tells Hollywood elites to save politics 'for your platform' when accepting awards
dailyNews.description: Sharon Osbourne criticized artists giving political speeches at award shows, saying viewers need "relief" from world events on "The Osbournes Podcast."

topStories.title: Son of British couple detained in Iran 'let down' by Starmer's leadership on parent's imprisonment amid war
topStories.description: The son of British prisoners in Iran slammed U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer's "non-existent" advocacy and urged President Donald Trump to remember prisoners during strikes on Iran.

topStories.title: Trump-backed Potomac sewage cleanup complete after massive spill ahead of summer America250 celebrations
topStories.description: Potomac River sewage spill repairs have been completed after President Donald Trump approved a federal disaster declaration allowing FEMA assistance.

topStories.title: For Trump, a Promised Economic Boom Collides With the Costs of War
topStories.description: President Trump had envisioned a growing economy and improving fortunes for American families in 2026. That appears at risk in his war with Iran.

topStories.title: Trump Pardons: Lobbyist Charged in Extortion Attempt
topStories.description: Josh Nass had recently represented Joseph Schwartz, a former nursing home executive who was convicted of tax crimes before being freed by the president late last year.

topStories.title: How Trump Officials Embraced an Animal Rights Campaign
topStories.description: The Trump administration is curbing animal experiments in response to shifts in public opinion, technological advances, years of animal rights advocacy and the work of a conservative activist.

topStories.title: Trump Wins When Oscar Winners Stay Silent
topStories.description: Right now it does matter a lot whether actors can find the right words.

topStories.description: Ali Vaez, the Iran project director at the International Crisis Group, explains the history of miscalculations that led to the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Tehran threatens to retaliate after U.S. attacks vital Iranian oil hub
dailyNews.description: President Trump said that other countries would join the U.S. in sending warships to the Strait of Hormuz, but did not share more specifics.

dailyNews.title: Trump thanks TSA agents working with no pay amid government shutdown
dailyNews.description: TSA officers faced their first full missed paycheck Friday.

dailyNews.title: FCC Chair Brendan Carr says broadcast licenses are not a "property right"
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with CBS News Saturday, Federal Communications Chair Brendan Carr doubled down on his warning that broadcast licenses could be revoked amid President Trump's criticisms of media coverage of the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump asks China, France, others to help keep Strait of Hormuz open amid war in Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump called on countries like the U.K., France, South Korea, Japan and even China to help keep the Strait of Hormuz open as Iran tries to strangle the flow of oil from the region. Charlie D'Agata reports.

dailyNews.title: Iran threatens to retaliate against neighbors; Trump urges countries to assist in securing Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump said in a Truth Social post that he directed U.S. Central Command to execute a bombing raid that "obliterated" military targets on Kharg Island.

dailyNews.title: FCC chair slams broadcasters after Trump disputes reports on Iran-damaged U.S. tankers
dailyNews.description: FCC Chair Brendan Carr blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."

dailyNews.title: Trump fundraising pitch features U.S. soldiers killed in Iran war
dailyNews.description: The email solicitation to benefit Trump’s PAC also offers donors “private national security briefings.”

dailyNews.title: Trump says he thinks Russian leader Putin is helping Iran in war
dailyNews.description: Russian leaders told President Trump they aren't sharing intelligence with Iran as it fights the U.S. and Israel, special envoy Steve Witkoff said this week.

dailyNews.title: Did tariff dividend checks just become more likely? Economists weigh in
dailyNews.description: Months after President Donald Trump suggested sending Americans a $2,000 tariff dividend check, there's a chance households could see that stimulus in 2026.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
